summary: Iteration 177: Verified P0 bug fixes for Grounds of Merit mobile UI. All font sizes reduced to 12px (text-xs) on mobile viewport (390x844). Legal Framework now displays actual legislation text (e.g., 's 18 Crimes Act 1900 (NSW)') instead of just count. No duplicate jurisdiction patterns found. Evidence cards properly filter 'optional' filename and 'Page: None'. Appellate Pathway visible for all grounds. Export buttons (Print View, PDF View, Word View) working.
critical_code_review_comments: EvidenceSummary.jsx correctly uses text-xs sm:text-sm for responsive font sizing
LegitimacyPanel.jsx correctly uses text-xs sm:text-sm for Appellate Viability Assessment
GroundsOfMerit.jsx lines 978-993 now display actual law section text under 'Legal Framework' heading
EvidenceSummary.jsx filters out 'optional' filename (line 29) and 'Page: None' (line 30)
No duplicate jurisdiction in law sections - jurAlreadyInAct check prevents '(NSW) (NSW)' pattern
All 4 grounds on test case have Appellate Pathway sections visible
Export buttons (Print View, PDF View, Word View) present and enabled
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 177 verified P0 mobile UI bug fixes for Grounds of Merit. Test case: case_d294f503192a (R v Homann, NSW). Key findings: (1) Font sizes reduced to 12px on mobile - evidenceSummaryFontSize, legitimacyPanelFontSize, supportingEvidenceHeadingFontSize, viabilityHeadingFontSize all 12px, (2) Legal Framework displays actual legislation text like 's Part 6 Criminal Procedure Act 1986 (NSW)', 's 18 Crimes Act 1900 (NSW)', (3) No duplicate jurisdiction patterns, (4) Evidence cards filter 'optional' filename and 'Page: None', (5) 4 Appellate Pathway sections visible, (6) 16 ground cards render correctly, (7) No horizontal scroll/overflow on mobile, (8) Export buttons working.

legal_framework_display.actual_legislation_text: PASS - Shows 's Part 6 Criminal Procedure Act 1986 (NSW)', 's 18 Crimes Act 1900 (NSW)', etc.
legal_framework_display.no_duplicate_jurisdiction: PASS - No '(NSW) (NSW)' patterns found in any of 4 Legal Framework sections

frontend.mobile_layout: PASS - No horizontal scroll/overflow issues on 390x844 viewport

bug_fixes_verified.P0_mobile_font_sizes: FIXED - All components use text-xs (12px) on mobile
bug_fixes_verified.legal_framework_text: FIXED - Displays actual legislation text instead of 'X law sections identified'
